action.reasoning: Observation: Runtime error - Conv2d channel mismatch in STConvBlock. The first temporal conv had in_channels=32 but input only has 1 channel. Analysis: The STConvBlock was not properly passing in_channels to the first temporal conv. Decision: Rewrite model.py with correct channel flow: input (1ch) -> temporal1 (1->hidden) -> graph_conv (hidden) -> temporal2 (hidden->out) + residual. Also improve train.py and predict.py for robustness.
